_provenance.source: Real deterministic Covera engine: a real Coverage Card, real plan cost-sharing, a real procedure estimate, and a real marketplace comparison over the committed CMS plan data. No model or network.
_provenance.note: Regenerate with `npx tsx scripts/mesh/capture-trace.ts`. Every line flagged real:true has engine-computed figures; the opening line is the patient's own words.

phases.speaker: You
phases.line: I'm 34, in Texas, and scared of a bill I can't pay.

phases.speaker: Concierge → Advisor
phases.line: Rank real plans on her bad-year risk, not just premium.

phases.speaker: Advisor → Concierge
phases.line: Gold caps her worst year at $8,500. It's the safe pick.

phases.speaker: Concierge → Marketplace
phases.line: Best marketplace plan is about $0/mo net of subsidy.

phases.speaker: Concierge → You
phases.line: The Gold plan fits you. Want me to set it up?

phases.speaker: Advocate → Employer
phases.line: Your $350/mo offer vs $0/mo on the marketplace: coordinating enrollment.

phases.speaker: Cost desk → Hospital
phases.line: MRI on her card: $279 before the $500 deductible, $56 after.
